items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Financial Analyst to join our Finance team and support financial planning, budgeting, and analysis across the business. You will work closely with the CFO and department heads to build models, track KPIs, and provide the financial insights that drive strategic decisions.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone early in their finance career who wants broad exposure to FP&A in a high-growth SaaS company.

Responsibilities

  • Build and maintain financial models for revenue forecasting, expense tracking, and scenario analysis
  • Prepare monthly financial reports, variance analysis, and board-ready presentations
  • Support the annual budgeting and quarterly re-forecasting processes
  • Track and analyze SaaS metrics including ARR, churn, CAC, and LTV
  • Partner with department leads to monitor budgets and identify cost optimization opportunities

Requirements

  • 1-3 years of experience in financial analysis, investment banking, or management consulting
  • Advanced Excel and financial modeling skills
  • Strong analytical and quantitative abilities
  • Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills
  • Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field

Nice to Have

  • Experience with SaaS financial metrics and unit economics
  • Familiarity with tools like Adaptive Insights, Netsuite, or Looker
  • CFA Level I or progress toward CPA certification
